$comment: Public, provider-detachable routing data. Model aliases are examples, not account configuration or a vendor dependency.

fast.purpose: Low-cost, low-latency work with a bounded and reversible output.

value.purpose: Bounded implementation and review where a stronger result is worth the additional cost.

frontier.purpose: Exception-only final authority for named quality, security, architecture, or release risk.

escalation.downgradeRule: When the named risk or quality evidence no longer applies, return the next bounded task to its role default tier.
escalation.fallbackRule: If a selected alias is unavailable, use another available alias in the same tier and record the selected alias and availability reason; do not silently promote tiers.
